name: Deer Valley YMCA Camp
description: Come play pickleball at Deer Valley YMCA Camp in Fort Hill, PA! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Kingwood Community Center
description: Kingwood Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Markleton, PA. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Somerset Fieldhouse
description: Somerset Fieldhouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Somerset, PA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.
